title: Item with dual status fields
description: POC H — declares both an observer-derived lifecycle status (status) and a producer-asserted self-report (producer_status). The two fields are intentionally independent at write time; consistency between them is a derived signal that the validator surfaces.

status.description: Observer-derived lifecycle state — what the substrate sees about this item's place in the lifecycle. Authored by observers (curators, lifecycle transitions), not by the agent that produced the work.

producer_status.description: Producer-asserted self-report — what the agent that produced the work claims about its own outcome. Optional: items without a producer_status are observer-only entries (no claim was filed).

note.description: Optional human-readable explanation; not used by the validator.
